description: A NON-STRATA titled rare find in modern Queensborough Row Home offering 3 bedrooms and 3 bathrooms with a bright open layout and high ceilings. Features include a contemporary kitchen with stainless steel appliances and quartz countertops, spacious living and dining areas, and a private patio ideal for entertaining. Upper level includes generous bedrooms, including a primary with walk-in closet and ensuite. Additional highlights include air conditioning, fenced yard, bonus storage/crawl space, and parking with carport garage with EV charging and lane access. Quiet, family-friendly location steps to shops, schools, parks, transit, Queensborough Landing, and Annacis Channel waterfront, with quick access to Richmond, Surrey, Burnaby, and highways ideal for families and professionals alike.
